calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bette Epstein for the Petitioner.

Ms. Epstein stated that this was a complicated accounting, that they had originally started the matter as a missing person, waited 5 years and then had to make adjustments when the date of death was determined. She also stated that the accountant fees were warranted and that there were no objections. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Mann.
